tweets.text:
👉This is a classic case of vacation gone wrong!

This smiley Iranian national came to the United States on a tourist visa... DECADES AGO.

TWENTY-THREE years ago, an immigration judge ordered him removed from the United States.

Not only did Shahin Farokhrani WAY OVERSTAY his visa — he also managed to rack up convictions for:
📌Sex abuse
📌Theft
📌Drugs
📌DUI

He’s pictured here right after his ICE Seattle arrest.

tweets.text:
🚤CABO ROJO, Puerto Rico — 524 kilos of cocaine and a rifle were seized this week when ICE special agents with @FBI, @CBPAMO, @DEAHQ and local police stopped a vessel from Venezuela.

🔗3 suspects are in custody.

Immigration enforcement is just one way ICE stops threats to public safety and national security!

📰Visit our newsroom for details on this and other developing cases.
